editorial.note: finding-aid sourced (source='editorial'); STAR=editor-centered documented, HOUSE=co-affiliation inferred; filterable for with/without sensitivity

params.tiers: documented and inferred are NOT commensurable; never sum

layout.engine: two-level community-aware FR (igraph, seeded): local FR per field community → meta-graph FR for centroids → disk relaxation
